task_params.subject: Arts in Care roundtable follow-up
reply_points: thank her for the thoughtful note and examples
say the hospital is exploring patient engagement ideas
mention interest in participatory art and reflective looking formats
ask whether her team could share a short call or materials
suggest next week is workable for a brief conversation

attributes.subject: Arts in Care roundtable follow-up
attributes.body: Hi Gabriel, I enjoyed our conversation after the panel. I’m attaching a few notes on how our museum’s public programs team has adapted slow-looking and collaborative art-making formats for healthcare partners. If it would be useful, I’d be happy to compare notes on what has translated well for patient-facing settings.

attributes.subject: Exhibition educator resource packet
attributes.body: Following up with the educator packet I mentioned. It focuses on gallery facilitation for adult audiences and may still spark ideas for clinical settings.

attributes.subject: Patient experience dashboard revisions
attributes.body: Can you review the updated dashboard tabs before leadership rounds?
